# Galaxy Longbow
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Galaxy%20Longbow&prop=wikitext


{{ItemInfo
| name = Galaxy Longbow
| slot = bow
| tier = GL
| soulbound = yes
| desc = A bow of incredible power, said to be all the energy of a singular galaxy, condensed into one single weapon.

| rof = 100
| range = yes
| projSpeed = 16
| lifetime = 470
| minDmg = 75
| maxDmg = 90
| shots = 3
| arcgap = 8
| fameb = 6

| effects = yes
| multihit = yes

| lootbag = white
}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Bows]]
{{NavBows}}
</noinclude>
